📒 Smart Journal Entry — Describe Any Transaction

Write what happened in plain English. The AI engine will map it to the correct accounts, apply double-entry rules, and post to your books.

Listening… speak your transaction
EN
Paid salary ₹80,000 by bank Sold goods ₹1,50,000 to XYZ Ltd on credit Received ₹75,000 from debtor in cash Purchased office supplies ₹8,500 cash Paid ₹25,000 advance tax by bank transfer Took loan of ₹5,00,000 from HDFC Bank Depreciation on machinery ₹20,000 Raised invoice ₹2,00,000 + 18% GST to client
Journal Entry #001
Revenue
AccountAccount HeadDr (₹)Cr (₹)
Total 0 0
